title: Big Globe - Remove Vanilla Structures
description: Remove Vanilla Structures in Big Globe
body:
This mod or datapack will remove all the vanilla structures from the [Big Globe](https://modrinth.com/mod/big-globe) generation. This is useful when making a modpack with many different structures.


<details>
<summary>List of structure removed</summary>

- bastion remnant
- buried treasure
- deset pyramid
- end city
- igloo
- jungle temple
- mineshaft
- mineshaft mesa
- nether fotress
- ocean monument
- ocean ruin cold
- pillager outpost
- shipwreck
- shipwreck beached
- stronghold
- swamp hut
- trail ruins
- village desert
- village plains
- village savanna
- village snowy
- village taiga
- woodland mansion

</details>



### Example before:
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13e56a132ed2d24333d163087ef6068b1fd488a5.webp)
### Example after:
![after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/511cee1c370760e8b005ea16d7ddba1dc891a060.webp)
